testcase.name: test_generate_returns_no_eligible_message

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (12 == 0 or 'No companies eligible' in 'Generated 12 invoices successfully (1 companies skipped due to start date)') + where 12 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9aea80>('successful', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9aea80> = {'billing_month': '2026-03', 'created_at': '2026-04-13T08:02:57.320484+00:00', 'created_by': 'ec8754c7-ed4b-436f-aab4-784b5999f366', 'errors': [], ...}.get + and 'Generated 12 invoices successfully (1 companies skipped due to start date)' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9ac500>('message', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9ac500> = {'message': 'Generated 12 invoices successfully (1 companies skipped due to start date)', 'result': {'billing_month': '2026-03', 'created_at': '2026-04-13T08:02:57.320484+00:00', 'created_by': 'ec8754c7-ed4b-436f-aab4-784b5999f366', 'errors': [], ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_invoice.py:196: in test_generate_returns_no_eligible_message assert result.get("successful", 0) == 0 or "No companies eligible" in data.get("message", "") E AssertionError: assert (12 == 0 or 'No companies eligible' in 'Generated 12 invoices successfully (1 companies skipped due to start date)') E + where 12 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9aea80>('successful', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9aea80> = {'billing_month': '2026-03', 'created_at': '2026-04-13T08:02:57.320484+00:00', 'created_by': 'ec8754c7-ed4b-436f-aab4-784b5999f366', 'errors': [], ...}.get E + and 'Generated 12 invoices successfully (1 companies skipped due to start date)' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9ac500>('message', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb427f9ac500> = {'message': 'Generated 12 invoices successfully (1 companies skipped due to start date)', 'result': {'billing_month': '2026-03', 'created_at': '2026-04-13T08:02:57.320484+00:00', 'created_by': 'ec8754c7-ed4b-436f-aab4-784b5999f366', 'errors': [], ...}}.get
